object_a.label: table
object_a.description: small side table next to recliner and sofa
object_a.long_form_open_description: A wooden side table with a dark finish positioned between a recliner and the sofa on the right side of the seating area. Surface holds small items and possibly a lamp (lamp base not clearly visible).
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Between the right-side recliner and the fireplace, adjacent to the seating group

object_b.label: table
object_b.description: small wooden side/console table next to sofa
object_b.long_form_open_description: A small dark-wood side table sits between the sofa (left) and the doorway (right). The table surface holds a lamp, plant, tissue box and some small items. The table is low, with a polished wood surface partially visible in the foreground.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Between the couch and the doorway; supports the lamp and potted plant.
